title: refund — declared entitlements
description: Eight entitlement keys. `refund_capture` is the boolean master gate — on for every tier by default (refund is table-stakes for any commerce workflow). `refund_customer_self_service` (Small+) permits customer-initiated refunds via POST /refunds. `refund_partial` (Medium+) unlocks partial refund_type + refund_lines. `refund_prorated` (Medium+) unlocks prorated refunds for cancelled memberships. `refund_multi_currency` (Medium+) permits cross-currency refunds. `refund_approval_workflow` (Small+, default on) enables the require-approval flow. `refund_extended_retention` (Enterprise) extends 7y to 10y. `refund_bulk_processing` (Enterprise) unlocks bulk-refund CLI + admin bulk-issue UI.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is inert: no refunds may be created, existing pending refunds refuse dispatch, all endpoints return 402. Every tier defaults on — off is an emergency ops-flip only.
enforcedBy: RefundObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
RefundOrchestrator refuses when the gate is closed (surfaces as REFUND_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED on the caller — chargeback module dispatches this way)
SDUI surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'refund.core'

entitlements.description: Enables POST /api/v1/refunds/mine — customer-initiated refund requests. When off, only admin can initiate refunds via POST /api/v1/refunds. Tenants with high-touch support flows may prefer to disable customer self-service.
enforcedBy: CustomerRefundController@store refuses when the gate is closed

entitlements.description: Unlocks refund_type='partial' + the refund_lines editor. Small tier limited to refund_type='full' (all-or-nothing refunds).
enforcedBy: RefundObserver.creating refuses when refund_type='partial' AND entitlement is off (returns REFUND_PARTIAL_NOT_ENTITLED)
SDUI refund_lines editor hidden when entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Unlocks refund_type='prorated' for cancelled memberships. Medium+ tier. Requires the target to be a Membership (validates via parent invoice.applied_to_type='membership'). Small tier tenants cancelling memberships receive no proration — the full period is either refunded (via refund_type=full) or kept.
enforcedBy: RefundObserver.creating refuses when refund_type='prorated' AND entitlement is off
SDUI prorated-refund UI hidden when entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Permits cross-currency refunds when refund.currency != parent payment.currency. Medium+ tier. Uses tenant's configured FX-rate source + freezes the exchange_rate on the refund row for audit. Small tier tenants must refund in the payment's original currency.
enforcedBy: RefundObserver.creating refuses when refund.currency != payment.currency AND entitlement is off
SDUI currency picker on refund create hidden when entitlement is off (locked to payment.currency)

entitlements.description: Master gate on the approval flow. Default ON for every tier. Off = every refund auto-approves regardless of amount / staleness / reason. Emergency-off only (small tenants who explicitly disable the workflow accept the SOX §404 audit risk). When on, thresholds are tenant-configurable via `refund.approval.*` config keys.
enforcedBy: RefundApprovalManager.compute refuses to trigger requires_approval when the entitlement is off (all refunds auto-approve)
SDUI pending-approvals queue hidden when entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends retention 7y → 10y for financial audit alignment (some regulated tenants require 10y for tax audit trails on refund records + reversal accounting).
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredRefundDataJob reads the entitlement to select the retention window (7y default; 10y when on)
ArchiveRefundFinancialRecordsOnTenantErasure applies the 10y window when the tenant held the entitlement at erasure time

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Unlocks bulk-refund CLI + admin bulk-issue UI for scenarios like class cancellation refunding 50+ athletes at once. Small + Medium tiers process refunds one at a time.
enforcedBy: refund:request CLI --bulk flag refuses when entitlement is off
SDUI bulk-issue UI hidden when entitlement is off
